items.title: Álvarez return could be Argentina's antidote to th...
items.summary: A sense of celebration has hung over Argentina ever since their 2022 World Cup win. That must change now.

items.title: Noskova holds her nerve to beat Muchova for first Wimbledon title
items.summary: Linda Noskova overcomes missing out on five Championship points in the second set, to defeat Karolina Muchova 6-2 5-7 6-3 to win her first Wimbledon title at 21 years old.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
